items.reason: Adds routing entries for the new log sampler design.
Adds LogSampler responsibilities, source files, and routing to the new sampler design.
It says RegisterClientRspPb reserves field 24 and uses log_sample_config field 25, but the proto diff changes field 24 to LogSampleConfigPb.
Removes the obsolete DATASYSTEM_LOG_RATE_LIMIT client environment variable entry.
Replaces log_rate_limit guidance with the new request/access/diagnostic sample-rate model and derivation rules.
Replaces the dscli log_rate_limit option with the three new sampling-rate options and derivation semantics.
Still documents log_rate_limit, DATASYSTEM_LOG_RATE_LIMIT, RegisterClientRspPb log_rate_limit sync, and LogRateLimiter despite the new LogSampler model.
Still describes log_rate_limit-driven local decisions and LogRateLimiter ownership instead of request_sample_rate and LogSampler trace-state behavior.
Still frames PLOG around bypassing log_rate_limit/LogRateLimiter rather than the new diagnostic_sample_rate and sampled-in request behavior.
Still says PLOG bypasses log_rate_limit request sampling, which is stale after the sampler replacement.
Still documents eager AccessRecorder construction/Record lifecycle and omits the new facade, lazy field materialization, and access_sample_rate pre-drop behavior.
